def negative_sort_order_depends_on_non_explicit_mapping_iteration_semantics():
    rule_id = "sort_order_depends_on_non_explicit_mapping_iteration_semantics"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag ordering logic that depends on implicit mapping iteration instead of explicit keys."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
